name: xac-loglevel
description: Minimal lightweight simple logging for JavaScript (browsers, node.js or elsewhere).

scripts.dist: rm -rf dist && cp src/lib/config.example.js src/lib/config.js &&  NODE_ENV=production node ./node_modules/xac-esbuild/index.js -s=src/lib/ -o=dist/ -banner=package.json -log=1  -t='**/*.{js,jsx,eot,css,svg,woff,woff2,ttf,otf}'
